The aircraft accelerates along the flight deck. C. A vertical rocket launches into the sky. D. The crew stands beneath the parked aircraft's wing.
Have the men wearing dark leather flight jackets and garrison caps transitioned from standing in a row to handling a cylindrical object near a ladder?

What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: Several men wearing leather flight jackets and military garrison caps stand in a row. Some caps are dark with metallic insignia while others are light-colored with lettering. Circular patches featuring eagle designs are visible on the chests of the jackets. Behind the group, large aircraft propeller blades and engine cowlings are positioned.

question: Describe what is happening
canonical_answer: Large twin-engine bombers with white star insignias are lined up on a wooden flight deck. The aircraft feature tricycle landing gear and dark fuselages against a rough ocean background. Crew members in dark uniforms crouch near the wings while the ship moves through choppy water. Multiple propellers are visible on the wings of the stationary aircraft.

question: Describe the visual progression of the crew members and their equipment.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the shot reveals three men wearing garrison caps; at 4s, five men stand in a row wearing leather flight jackets with patches; at 6s, the group transitions to working with a cylindrical object near a ladder; at 10s, a large twin-engine aircraft appears parked on the ground.

question: Describe the specific text overlays and aircraft details shown during the sequence.
canonical_answer: At 10s, white text identifying the Doolittle Raid appears over the aircraft; at 12s, the commander's name and date display below the title; at 18s, the camera shows aircraft landing gear on a wooden deck; at 20s, text states sixteen bombers launched from the USS Hornet.
